assertions.assertion: Adds or references the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration NuGet package
assertions.rationale: Does not mention or reference the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration NuGet package. Creates a custom endpoint from scratch instead.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddIdentityServerConfiguration() on the service collection
assertions.rationale: Does not call AddIdentityServerConfiguration(). Builds a manual DCR endpoint without the Duende configuration API.

assertions.assertion: Calls MapDynamicClientRegistration() to map the DCR endpoint
assertions.rationale: Does not call MapDynamicClientRegistration(). Uses app.MapPost('/connect/register', ...) as a custom endpoint.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that DCR requires Business Edition or higher license
assertions.rationale: Does not mention the Business Edition license requirement. Only vaguely suggests checking Duende docs for built-in DCR support.

assertions.assertion: The MapDynamicClientRegistration() call includes RequireAuthorization() or the response warns about securing the endpoint
assertions.rationale: While not using MapDynamicClientRegistration(), the response does show RequireAuthorization('dcr') on the custom endpoint and mentions securing it.
